[Helper] Upload local files to an Apps Script project

Usage: gws +push [OPTIONS] --script <ID>

Options:
      --sanitize <TEMPLATE>  Sanitize API responses through a Model Armor template. Requires cloud-platform scope. Format: projects/PROJECT/locations/LOCATION/templates/TEMPLATE. Also reads GWS_SANITIZE_TEMPLATE env var.
      --script <ID>          Script Project ID
      --dir <DIR>            Directory containing script files (defaults to current dir)
      --dry-run              Validate the request locally without sending it to the API
      --format <FORMAT>      Output format: json (default), table, yaml, csv
  -h, --help                 Print help

EXAMPLES:
  gws script +push --script SCRIPT_ID
  gws script +push --script SCRIPT_ID --dir ./src

TIPS:
  Supports .gs, .js, .html, and appsscript.json files.
  Skips hidden files and node_modules automatically.
  This replaces ALL files in the project.
